landing.heroTitle: Grow smarter. Earn more. Worry less.
landing.heroSubtitle: FarmHelper diagnoses crop problems, plans the most profitable crops for your land, builds a smart farm calendar, and connects you directly to buyers — all from your phone.

diagnose.title: Diagnose
diagnose.body: Snap a photo of a sick leaf and get an AI diagnosis with treatment steps in your language.

plan.title: Plan profit
plan.body: Tell us your land and season — AI ranks the most profitable crops for your region.

calendar.title: Smart calendar
calendar.body: Auto-generated sowing, watering, fertilizing and harvest tasks. Never miss a step.

sell.title: Sell direct
sell.body: List your harvest and reach buyers directly. Skip the middleman, keep the margin.

how.step1Body: Tell us your country and the crops you grow.
how.step2Body: Get diagnosis, profit plans, and a personalized calendar.
how.step3Body: Follow the plan and list your harvest in the marketplace.

auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to your FarmHelper account.
auth.signupSubtitle: Start growing smarter in two minutes.

errors.passwordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.codeRequired: Enter the 6-digit code from your email.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email to start the recovery process.
forgotPassword.neutralMessage: If we have security questions on file for this email, you'll see them next. If not, please contact support.
forgotPassword.answersSubtitle: Answer both questions and set a new password.
forgotPassword.wrongAnswers: Those answers don't match. Please try again.
forgotPassword.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait 15 minutes and try again.
forgotPassword.updateFailed: Could not update your password. Please try again.
forgotPassword.noQuestions: No security questions are set for this email. Please contact support.

securityQuestions.sectionHelp: Pick 2 different questions and answer each. You'll use these to reset your password.
securityQuestions.saveError: Could not save. Please try again.

cropDoctor.title: Crop Doctor
cropDoctor.subtitle: Attach a photo of the affected crop — AI will diagnose it.
cropDoctor.photoMissing: Please attach a photo of the crop to diagnose
cropDoctor.missingInputs: Add crop name and a few words about the symptoms.
cropDoctor.fallback: We couldn't reach the AI right now. General guidance for {{crop}}: inspect leaves daily, remove infected parts, water in the morning, and avoid overhead irrigation. Please retry.

profit.title: Profit Planner
profit.subtitle: AI-ranked profitable crops for your land, region and season.
profit.fallback: We couldn't generate a plan right now. Please retry in a moment.

market.title: Market
market.subtitle: Live prices and direct-to-buyer classifieds.
market.noPrices: No prices available yet for your region. Set your country/region in Settings to see relevant data.
market.aiUnavailable: AI is unavailable. Please retry shortly.
market.activeSubtitle: Sell direct. Contact details are revealed on request.
